sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of 'no' before 'te' changes the meaning of the sentence, as 'noté' (I noticed) is replaced by 'no te' (I didn't to you), which makes the sentence less coherent.
'noté' (I noticed) is replaced by 'te' (to you), which removes the subject and action, significantly altering the meaning of the sentence.
